view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT jldw.dwdm,jldw.SID
FROM jldw
ORDER BY jldw.SID ASC

groups.caption: 未收汇合同的出运明细

view.params:
SELECT xbzxsheet.mc,xbzxsheet.dm
FROM xbzxsheet
WHERE   (xbzxsheet.ssmk="商品组代码")
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.mc ASC

SELECT hbdm.SID,hbdm.hbdm
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

groups.name: 未收汇合同的出运明细

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bm like "%外销%")
 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC
